Book a Call →
Contact

Book a Discovery Call.

30 minutes. No deck. We ask about your operations, you tell us what's eating time or costing money, we tell you what we'd build and roughly what it costs.

Via WhatsApp

Fastest way to reach us.

Send a message describing what you're trying to automate. We respond within a few hours (during IST business hours).

WhatsApp +91 91009 33191
Via Email

For detailed enquiries.

If you prefer email — especially for international clients who want to share more context upfront.

amorisprana@gmail.com
What to expect on the call
01

You describe the problem

What's taking the most time, where leads are getting lost, what's being done manually that shouldn't be.

02

We identify the fit

We name the agent type, scope the integration, and tell you what would and wouldn't work.

03

Ballpark cost on the call

Not a 'we'll send you a proposal in 5 days'. You get a range on the call based on what we've heard.

04

Next step if it makes sense

Either a deeper scoping session or a proposal. Nothing is pushed.

Good fit for a call if you are:
  • → A business with 5–500 employees looking to automate specific operations
  • → Spending ₹15k+/month on a function that could be automated
  • → Already using CRM, WhatsApp Business, or email marketing tools
  • → Interested in deploying within 60 days, not 'exploring for next year'

AI agency. India-built, globally deployable.
